Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to 1C:Enterprise. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {object.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to 1C:Enterprise and connected to new database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. The database is missing from the collected profile.

User {object.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to 1C:Enterprise and established a connection to new 1C server {dst.host} on host {event_src.host}. The server is missing from the collected profile.
User {object.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to 1C:Enterprise on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
New user {object.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to 1C:Enterprise on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {object.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to 1C:Enterprise on host {event_src.host}. The user account name in the operating system changed.
